description: display: inline-block badges/buttons/tags/swatch flowing inline with text on the baseline, wrapping, with padding/border/background/border-radius.
visual_assertions: A red rounded 'NEW' badge sits on the baseline between the surrounding words, which continue after it.
Two rounded bordered buttons 'Approve' and 'Reject' flow inline with the words 'or' between and 'before noon.' after them.
Three bordered tag chips flow with the paragraph text, which wraps onto a second line.
A solid green 30x12pt swatch sits on the text baseline with text before and after it.
